content.en:
Suddenly.

Several more primordial ancients appeared above the Silent Black Sea, although they were not comparable to the half-step sevenfold ancestor level, but they were also the top sixfold peak ancestors.

These primordial ancients also joined the ranks of besieging Ye Tian.

If it was before, Ye Tian didn't take these primordial ancients in his eyes at all, but now he can't beat them.

In the end, Ye Tian's replica body still fell.

But before the fall, Ye Tian still killed a primordial ancient man at the peak level of the sixfold original ancestor.

After killing Ye Tian, these primordial ancients gradually lost their figures after a while.

......

In fact, Ye Tian could have escaped, but there was no need for that.

If he escapes, his body will be severely damaged, and he will have to slowly repair his injuries, or he will be released from replicating his body.

If you cancel the copy body, you might as well fall directly.

Subsequently, after Ye Tian copied a replica body again, he entered the Silent Black Sea again and came to the area where he fell.

"Primordial Ancient Pearl!"

Ye Tian directly put away the Primordial Ancient Pearl.

This was the Primordial Ancient Bead on the Primordial Ancient that he had killed before, and the other Primordial Ancients had not taken it.

From this, it can be seen that these primordial ancients did not have much wisdom, as if everything was based on instinct.

Otherwise, this primordial ancient pearl would have been taken away a long time ago.

In the following years, Ye Tian harvested a few drops of black liquor, as well as some primordial ancient beads, and once again provoked the primordial ancients who were comparable to the half-step sevenfold primordial ancestors.

In this way, Ye Tian finally never found the Yuan Shen Drum again, and the Primordial Ancient Bead had also collected a lot, so he didn't need it for the time being, so he didn't continue to collect it.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sent a few drops of black liquor to the Tongtian Origin Domain Boundary, preparing to send one to his apprentice Han Xuan.

She also knew that Han Xuan had been trying to comprehend the 364th Extreme Extreme Dao, but had never succeeded, if she was refining black liquid, she was afraid that she would have a chance to succeed in comprehending it.

......

"Master!"

Han Xuan was called to him by Ye Tian, a little curious about what the master told him to do.

At this time, Ye Tian took out a drop of black liquor: "This is the black liquor from the primordial antiquity, the Yuan Shen Drum, which can make the comprehension get an unimaginable improvement, even if the peak powerhouse of the sixfold original ancestor comprehends the Yuan Dao, it will be of great help." I will give you a drop for the teacher, and there should be hope to help you comprehend the three hundred and sixty-four extreme paths!"

"Thank you, Master!"

Han Xuan said excitedly.

If this black liquid really has such an effect, then she really hopes to comprehend the 364th Extreme Extreme Dao, and naturally she will also comprehend the 365th Extreme Extreme Dao!

After going back.

Han Xuan took this drop of black liquid and swallowed it in one gulp.

Rumble!!!

A strange force poured into her Extreme Will, putting her in a special state, and her comprehension reached an unimaginable level.

In this state, Han Xuan began to do his best to comprehend the 364th Extreme Extreme Dao.

Time passed slowly, and when this drop of black liquid was constantly consumed, Han Xuan's comprehension progressed extremely fast.

Finally, before this drop of black liquid was exhausted, she finally comprehended the three hundred and sixty-four extreme paths, and her own extreme paths had completely reached the extreme realm at this moment.

At this point, Han Xuan had thoroughly comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths and reached the true Great Perfection!

"I have finally comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, so that I can be promoted to the Quadruple Origin Ancestor in the most perfect way, and there is even hope to condense the Ninefold Dao Fruit and the Ninefold Yuan Dao in the future!"

Han Xuan muttered.

Of course, she also knows that the process behind is still difficult, and it will take a long time to slowly cultivate, and everything is in a hurry.

Three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths have been comprehended, and Han Xuan's next purpose is to create a peerless primordial mastery technique, and for her, this step is not difficult.

With the background of her previous life, she is now in the realm of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, and she has comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths, creating several peerless primordial control techniques, it is simply too easy!

It didn't take long for the five Peerless Primordial Mastery Techniques to be created by her.

Moreover, Han Xuan had already prepared enough Taishi Golden Liquid for herself, so she could directly condense the second, third, fourth, and even fifth natal primordial control techniques.

Subsequently, after Han Xuan talked to Master Ye Tian, he began to impact the Quadruple Origin Ancestor Realm.

Everything went very smoothly, and Han Xuan easily stepped into the realm of the Fourfold Ancestral Ancestor.

And as soon as he broke through, he was almost invincible in the realm of the Fourfold Primordial Ancestor.

Han Xuan still has a lot of resources, so it won't be long before she can be promoted to the peak realm of the Fourfold Origin Ancestor, and those half-step Fivefold Origin Ancestors will not be her opponents at that time.

Han Xuan broke through, Ye Tian was naturally very happy, after all, such a demonic genius became his disciple, and he would have face when he said it!

Of course.

Ye Tian didn't expect this apprentice to give him much help, his growth rate was very fast, and Han Xuan really couldn't catch up with him.

However, with one more apprentice, when you grow up in the future, you can still help yourself deal with some small things.

......

"The black liquor of the Yuan Shen Drum is really good, during these years, I have consumed all the black liquid, and the Endless Yuan Dao Prototype has improved a lot, and the power is several times that of before!" Ye Tian muttered.

If it is described as a percentage, the prototype of the Endless Yuan Dao before was one percent, and now it has reached the level of at least five percent, although there is still a long way to go before comprehending the true Endless Yuan Dao, but at least I see hope.

If there is a huge amount of black liquid, he can really comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao very quickly!

It's a pity that the black liquor is too valuable and too rare, and now that no new Yuan Shen Drum has been found, he can't get it.

Another period of time has passed, and the news that a grand trade fair is about to open in the Shattered Void Realm has arrived.

In fact, such trade fairs are opened every few years, also to integrate resources.

With the addition of the Sixfold Ancestor level, the consumption of resources is very fast, and many powerhouses are very lacking in resources, so such a trade will be very necessary.

Moreover, only the Sixfold Origin Ancestor is eligible to participate in such a trade fair, and the half-step Sixfold Ancestor is not eligible.

So, Ye Tian came to the Shattered Void Realm in advance.

Not only did he come, but those Dao Ancestors of the Ancient Dao Alliance also came.

Shattered Void Megacity.

This is the largest trading giant city in the Shattered Void Realm, it is usually not open, and it will only be opened at this time, and the original ancestors who entered here are all sixfold original ancestors.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, this is the three hundred and seventy-seventh time I've participated in such a trade fair!"

Xubai Daozu said.
